primary_responsibilities: Render body textarea with monospace font
Handle local state for form inputs
Trigger save callback on button click

key_changes: URL history management for new content creation
file_insights.data_flow: id param → useEffect loads content → state updates → child components render with callbacks

patterns_discovered.pattern_name: Async Data Loading with Loading State
patterns_discovered.description: Fetches content on mount/id change, manages loading state during async operation
React controlled components for form inputs (title, body, contentType) with onChange handlers
Conditional logic branching on contentId presence to determine create or update operation
Parent component passes callbacks to children for state mutations
Uses spread operator to create new state objects rather than mutating existing state

gotchas_discovered.issue: Content type selector uses plain HTML <select> element instead of custom Select component, inconsistent with Input/Textarea pattern
Using window.history.replaceState for URL updates after new content creation
gotchas_discovered.impact: potential browser history issues if combined with router navigation

gotchas_discovered.issue: handleAcceptGenerated appends generated text without size validation or limits
gotchas_discovered.impact: could create extremely large content body, performance/storage issues

gotchas_discovered.issue: API calls (getById, create, update) have no error handling or user feedback
gotchas_discovered.impact: users won't know if save/load failed

gotchas_discovered.issue: .catch(() => setContent(null)) silently handles errors without logging

completed_objectives: Created ContentEditor component with title, body, and content type fields
Implemented content loading from API via useContent hook
Implemented create/update save functionality with URL navigation
Integrated GenerationPanel and ValidationPanel into layout
Wired up acceptance of generated content into editor
Proper layout with fixed right sidebar (w-96)
Loading states and basic validation (disabled save if no title)

recommendations.recommendation: Create custom Select component to match design system
recommendations.reasoning: ContentEditor mixes custom UI components with plain HTML, breaks consistency
recommendations.implementation_note: Extract to ui/select/Select component like other UI primitives

recommendations.recommendation: Add error handling and user feedback for API operations
recommendations.reasoning: Current implementation silently fails, users have no visibility into errors
recommendations.implementation_note: Add try-catch with toast notifications, error boundaries

recommendations.recommendation: Add validation for content type field
recommendations.reasoning: Content type selector has no validation, could submit invalid values
recommendations.implementation_note: Add required field validation to ContentEditor

recommendations.recommendation: Replace manual URL history management with useNavigate hook
recommendations.reasoning: More reliable than window.history when combined with React Router
recommendations.implementation_note: Use useNavigate() from react-router-dom instead of replaceState

recommendations.recommendation: Add size/length limits to generated content append
recommendations.reasoning: Unbounded append could create unmanageably large content
recommendations.implementation_note: Set max body length validation or chunk generated content

recommendations.recommendation: Add loading/saving indicators for better UX
recommendations.reasoning: Save state exists but not reflected in UI feedback
recommendations.implementation_note: Add toast notifications, disable form during save, show spinner

recommendations.recommendation: Consider form library integration (React Hook Form, Formik)
recommendations.reasoning: Current approach manually manages form state and validation
recommendations.implementation_note: Could simplify multi-field form management and validation
